mapper.select: select user_id, balance_cents, total_recharge_cents, total_consumed_cents, update_time from fish_user_balance where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into fish_user_balance (user_id, balance_cents, total_recharge_cents, total_consumed_cents, update_time) values (#{userId}, 0, 0, 0, sysdate())
mapper.update:
update fish_user_balance set balance_cents = balance_cents + #{delta},
total_recharge_cents = total_recharge_cents + #{delta},
total_consumed_cents = total_consumed_cents + (case when #{delta} < 0 then -#{delta} else 0 end),
update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId}
and balance_cents + #{delta} >= 0
